failure_reason: Neither cited block mentions 'Transitway'. p001_c0015 says 'future bus lanes' and p002_c0001 says 'bus lanes' on '34 th Street' but neither establishes the connection to the Transitway project. Co-occurrence in a Transitway CAC meeting document is not sufficient — the block text itself must state the relation.

Cited block p001_c0015 does not mention 'Transitway'. It states 'Consideration needs to be given to the snow removal process in the future bus lanes' without any explicit textual link to the Transitway project. The 'future bus lanes' are not anchored to the Transitway within this block. Co-occurrence in a Transitway meeting document is not a relation — the block text itself must state the connection.

The cited block p006_c0001 says 'The proposed design will be presented at the next CAC meeting.' but never mentions '34th Street Transitway' or any project name. The connection between the claim and the project is purely document-level co-occurrence — the document happens to be about the Transitway CAC. Per instructions, co-occurrence in a document is not a relation; the cited block must state the connection. The evidence quote does not tie 'proposed design' to the Transitway project.
